历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 144th in 2022 → 132nd in 2023 → 122nd in 2024 → 117th in 2025, rankings have been moving forward over the past four years (competition intensifying year by year), with a cumulative forward shift of about 27 places, averaging about 9 places per year; baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 117th; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 17 in 2022 → 23 in 2023 → 15 in 2024 → 20 in 2025 → only 6 in 2026, a sharp reduction of 70% from 2025 to 2026, with enrollment dropping from 20 to 6, significantly increasing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking approximately 11th in 2026 (Top 20), ranking has been rising in recent years (15th in 2021 → 12th in 2024 → 11th in 2025/2026), the university's comprehensive strength and reputation are in the top tier nationally; reputation evaluation for 2026 is 'clearly negative', mainly involving Yang Yun's teacher ethics misconduct and academic fraud incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 56th), the label of 'Seven Sons of National Defense' still attractive; no obvious record of admission cutoff drops historically; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, and 16 other A- and above disciplines, engineering strength is extremely strong, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other core engineering majors at Beihang continue to be highly popular socially; total number of candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, basically the same as 2025 (physics category 44,491 + history category 21,406 ≈ 65,897), the candidate scale has not changed significantly; Beihang is located in Beijing (university_home_province=Beijing), Ningxia is a northwestern province, cross-province application; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is very small (only 27 in 2025), regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of approximately 117th in 2025, the enrollment plan dropping sharply from 20 to 6 in 2026 (a 70% reduction), the university's rising ranking (Soft Science 11th), the negative reputation event possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the enrollment reduction is the most critical factor affecting rankings, and intensified competition will push rankings significantly forward; predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 73rd, with a range of 53–93.
